prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm dawn light rests on a calm living face against a soft warm shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
A close reverent view of the risen Christ's face, the eyes calm and living, a faint scar at the brow where thorns had been, warm dawn light on the cheek against soft shadow, an expression of peace beyond suffering, a fold of white robe at the shoulder. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the calm living face in the dawn light.

Cut to close-up — the calm, living eyes.

Cut to insert — the faint scar at the brow.

Cut to macro detail — warm dawn light on the cheek.

Cut to insert — the still, peaceful mouth.

Cut to lower framing — the white robe at the shoulder.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the living face at peace.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Peace beyond suffering.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — the calm living face in the dawn light
Cut to close-up — the calm, living eyes
Cut to insert — the faint scar at the brow
Cut to macro detail — warm dawn light on the cheek
Cut to insert — the still, peaceful mouth
Cut to lower framing — the white robe at the shoulder
Return to full composition, end hold on the living face at peace
